claims.claim_text: The runtime is a governance/runtime layer and not a universal host replacement.

source_refs.contains: The repository is now intentionally narrowed to three live surfaces:
本仓当前只保留三类 live 能力：

claims.claim_text: Existing-repo guidance is manual and repo-owned; this repository no longer performs one-click target-repo rollout.

source_refs.contains: this repository no longer attaches to external target repos, no longer writes governance baselines into them, and no longer exposes attachment, session-bridge, or apply-all flows.
本仓不再 attach 外部目标仓，不再向外部仓写治理基线，也不再暴露 attachment、session-bridge 或 apply-all 流程。

claims.claim_text: Retired attachment and write-bridge command names fail closed with explicit retirement messages.

source_refs.contains: The following names are intentionally retired and now fail closed with explicit messages:
以下名称已明确退役，现在都会 fail-closed 返回退休提示：

claims.claim_text: The canonical acceptance chain remains build -> test -> contract/invariant -> hotspot.

source_refs.contains: self-repo governance: `build -> test -> contract/invariant -> hotspot`
本仓自治理：`build -> test -> contract/invariant -> hotspot`

claims.claim_text: The multi-repo trial loop is retired and preserved only as historical evidence, not as a live rollout capability.

source_refs.contains: This repository no longer manages target-repo rollout, attachment posture, session-bridge flows, or batch apply-all governance.
本仓不再管理 target-repo rollout、attachment posture、session-bridge 流程，也不再提供 batch apply-all 治理。

claims.claim_text: Complete hybrid final-state closure is certified on the current branch baseline by GAP-111 evidence and remains subject to claim-drift gates.

source_refs.contains: Complete hybrid final-state closure is certified on the current branch baseline.
Complete realization is now certified on the current branch baseline by the post-`GAP-103` queue `GAP-104..111`.

claims.claim_text: Post-GAP-111 external source assumptions are machine-checked before they can strengthen final-state claims.

source_refs.contains: Keep `GAP-111` certification valid only while current-source compatibility checks and claim-drift gates continue to pass.
Post-`GAP-111` protocol adoption must include a current-source compatibility review.

claims.claim_text: LTP heavy-stack promotion is autonomous only when the promotion policy selects exactly one evidence-triggered package; otherwise it defers all packages or requires owner-directed labeling.

source_refs.contains: Do not directly force the full heavy stack as the default route.
defer_without_trigger_evidence

claims.claim_text: Autonomous continuation after the LTP promotion fence is selected by a next-work policy that prioritizes gate repair and evidence freshness before any LTP implementation.

source_refs.contains: defer_ltp_and_refresh_evidence
Post-`GAP-113`, the correct way to decide what to do next is `scripts/select-next-work.py`.

claims.claim_text: Claude Code is an owner-directed first-class supported host alongside Codex in governance outcome, while adapter-tier recovery remains host-specific and evidence-bound.

source_refs.contains: equal governance requirements for rules, gates, evidence, rollback, risk classification, and claim drift
host-specific limitations remain visible through adapter tier, `degrade_reason`, and `platform_na` where needed

claims.claim_text: The host feedback loop is host-only and repo-local; it does not depend on target-repo daily runs or session-bridge evidence.

source_refs.contains: it does not depend on target-repo daily runs
不再依赖 target-repo daily runs

claims.claim_text: Target-run, KPI, and effect artifacts remain archived evidence only and do not prove current live capability.

source_refs.contains: target-run, KPI, and effect artifacts remain historical evidence only
target-run、KPI、effect 相关文件只保留历史证据意义
